sentence: The bruzzitorium you walked into with delularisma is the one you walked out of changed.

wombos.definition: A venue or setting full of eligible men — a place brimming with romantic potential. 'Bruzz' is slang for a guy. The male counterpart to huzzitorium.
Charisma that is completely delusional — confidence and magnetism so overblown it crosses into self-delusion, yet somehow remains charming. 'He insists he has aura but he's got delularisma.'
